suppressedFindings.title: T-011 GitHub Issues Comments API sort parameter
suppressedFindings.note: GitHub Issues Comments API may not support sort=created&direction=desc on all endpoints. However, the fallback to .[0] on the default-sorted response still returns the correct last comment for the default ascending sort, and the per_page=1 limits the response. Low confidence since the API docs confirm sort/direction on the comments endpoint.

suppressedFindings.title: T-014 crossTeamKeywords is a public property
suppressedFindings.note: crossTeamKeywords is declared as a public property rather than private with a setter, but this is intentional to allow callers to configure it directly from config.json values. Acceptable for a plugin.

reviewNotes: All 15 bugs fixed across 12 files covering P0 critical, P1 high, and P2 medium severity
T-008 GraphQL injection fix: All 5 methods now use parameterized -F variables, no string interpolation
T-001 body append: Properly reads existing body first, concatenates with separator
T-002 exitCode: Fixed in 4 files (ts+js for hierarchical-sync and board-resolver)
T-007 pagination: Both per-us-sync and multi-project-sync now paginate with deduplication
T-010 label creation: ensureLabelExists helper properly handles missing labels and permission errors
T-011 getLastComment: Uses reverse sort with per_page=1 to get newest comment directly
T-015 config flags: Documented, warning on partial config, logs which flag triggered activation
